page_summary: A page featuring a long column of large integer factorizations and multiplications on the left, juxtaposed with a tall, narrow, distressed black silhouette of a standing human figure on the right.

symbols.description: Multiplication cross 'x' used between prime factors in every line
Superscript exponent indicators (e.g. ², ³) attached to leading 2, 3, 5, 7

decorations.description: Tall, narrow, vertically elongated black silhouette of a standing human figure rendered in a distressed, eroded, dripping/fragmented style reminiscent of ancient or Albrecht Dürer-like figurative woodcut. The figure appears to wear draped or ragged clothing, with head, shoulders, torso, and legs visible; the surface is broken by numerous white gaps and streaks giving it a weathered appearance.
decorations.position: right side of the page, occupying nearly the full height
components: head with suggestion of a small protrusion/horns or cap
long draped/flowing body extending down to the lower legs
two legs visible at the bottom
scattered white holes and streaks giving a distressed, eroded texture

uncertain_or_unreadable: Some of the very long multi-digit numbers in the factorizations are difficult to verify digit-by-digit and may contain a transcription error.
The exact identity and source of the silhouette figure is unclear (possibly a Dürer-inspired or antique figurine).
